message:
refactor(offline): consolidate layout into private _offline module and block indexing

- Move metadata (title, description, robots, canonical) from app/offline/layout.tsx
  into app/_offline/layout.tsx so the private module owns all offline-page metadata
- Replace app/offline/layout.tsx body with a single re-export from ../_offline/layout,
  eliminating duplication and ensuring the public route is a thin wrapper
- Add robots { index: false, follow: false } to metadata so search engines never
  index the offline fallback page
- Add clarifying module-purpose comments to every _offline file explaining that
  the folder is intentionally non-routable in the App Router
- Fix trailing whitespace in page.tsx JSX and add missing final newline

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
